rules.name: Native Technologies Only
rules.description: Use only C++20 standard library, Windows SDK, and Microsoft-provided tools (vcpkg, MSVC, CppUnitTest). nlohmann/json via vcpkg is allowed. No Boost, no non-Microsoft third-party tools.

rules.name: Sealed Core Library
rules.description: AeostaraCore is a sealed static library. Consumers use public headers in include/AeostaraCore/ only.

rules.name: Forsetti Boundary Compliance
rules.description: This branch is a Windows-native realization branch and may integrate with the Windows Forsetti framework at the platform services layer. Domain-level contracts remain Forsetti-independent. Forsetti boundary rules: no framework modification, no direct module-to-module communication, no direct OS communication, no module-owned UI, framework-mediated I/O only.

rules.name: Interface-First Design
rules.description: All major components expose abstract interfaces (pure virtual classes). Implementations use constructor dependency injection.

rules.name: Strict OOP
rules.description: All concrete classes must be final. All classes use constructor DI. No hidden globals or singletons.

rules.name: One-Way Dependencies
rules.description: AeostaraCore depends on nothing except nlohmann/json. AeostaraCLI depends on AeostaraCore. Tests depend on AeostaraCore. No reverse or lateral imports.

rules.name: Deterministic Behavior
rules.description: No random production behavior. All repair plans are deterministic. Same input must produce same output.

rules.name: Proprietary Licensing
rules.description: All source files carry proprietary header comment. Copyright (c) 2026 James Daley. All Rights Reserved.

rules.name: No Mutation Without Rollback
rules.description: Every file mutation must be preceded by a backup. Rollback must be available for every repair action.

forsetti_integration_boundary.rule: Domain (AeostaraCore) must not import Forsetti modules. Platform layer (AeostaraCLI) may import Forsetti modules for framework-mediated hosting.

must_not_import_rules.reason: Domain contracts and algorithms are Forsetti-independent
Platform shell may integrate with Forsetti per R003 boundary rules
